zh.lifeSummary: 當William Moreton於大約1474年出生在英國英格蘭爾莫雷頓時，他的父親Ralph Moreton25歲，母親Lady Margaret Tresham25歲。他於1511年與Alice Brereton在英國爾結婚。他們至少是2個兒子和7個女兒的父母。他去世於1536年在英國英格蘭爾莫雷頓 姆 阿爾姆洛福享年63歲。

nameMeanings.name: Moreton
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: French: nickname from a double diminutive of   More   2 ‘Moor’. Compare   Moret  .

variants.name: Morton
meanings: English and Scottish: habitational name from any of the many places called Mor(e)ton, named with Old English mōr ‘moor’ + tūn ‘farmstead, estate’. There has probably been some confusion with Morten , and perhaps also with Murton . This English name has also been established in Ireland since the 13th century.
American shortened and altered form of Swedish Mårtensson or Mortensson (see Martenson and Mortenson ), which could also be substituted for the Finnish cognate Marttinen.

nameMeanings.name: William
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Probably the most successful of all the Old French names of Germanic origin that were introduced to England by the Normans. It is derived from Germanic wil ‘will, desire’ + helm ‘helmet, protection’. The fact that it was borne by the Conqueror himself does not seem to have inhibited its favour with the ‘conquered’ population: in the first century after the Conquest it was the commonest male name of all, and not only among the Normans. In the later Middle Ages it was overtaken by John , but continued to run second to that name until the 20th century, when the picture became more fragmented.

en.lifeSummary: When William Moreton was born about 1474, in Moreton, Cheshire, England, United Kingdom, his father, Ralph Moreton, was 25 and his mother, Lady Margaret Tresham, was 25. He married Alice Brereton in 1511, in Cheshire, England. They were the parents of at least 2 sons and 7 daughters. He died in 1536, in Moreton cum Alcumlow, Cheshire, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 63.

Il a épousé Alice Brereton en 1511, à Cheshire, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils et 7 filles. Il est décédé en 1536, à Moreton cum Alcumlow, Cheshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 63 ans.

ko.Little Moreton, Moreton cum Alcumlow, As: 영국 잉글랜드 체실르 모레턴 c 알c로
ko.lifeSummary: William Moreton(이)가 대략 1474년 영국 잉글랜드 체실르 모레턴에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Ralph Moreton(은)는 25세였고, 그의 어머니 Lady Margaret Tresham(은)는 25세였다. 그는 1511년 영국 체실르에서 Alice Brereton(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들과 일곱 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1536년 영국 잉글랜드 체실르 모레턴 c 알c로에서 63세의 나이로 사망했다.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда William Moreton родился около 1474 г. в местности моретон, чешир, Англия, Великобритания, его отцу по имени Ralph Moreton было 25 лет, а матери, которую звали Lady Margaret Tresham, 25. Он женился на женщине по имени Alice Brereton в 1511 г. в местности чешир, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына и 7 дочерей.
